note: Archive/Wiedijk100Theorems/BallotProblem.lean:345-346 — theorem ballot_problem : ∀ q p, q < p → uniformOn (countedSequence p q) staysPositive = (p - q) / (p + q); docstring 'The ballot problem', file header cites Theorem 30 of the 100 Theorems List (the ballot problem).
